column2: Verify System Traces HLR Requirements Correctly
column3: ['Log in to the system as a user with appropriate permissions. ', 'Identify and select a specific HLR requirement for tracing. ', 'Request the system to trace the selected HLR requirement back to its corresponding LLR requirements. ', 'Verify that all traced LLR requirements are complete and accurate. ']
column4: ['Successful login. ', 'Selected HLR requirement is displayed on screen. ', 'The system displays the traced LLR requirements related to the selected HLR requirement. ', 'Each traced LLR requirement is reviewed for completeness and accuracy. ']
